universal 的sql报错

```SQL
-- script-mode
SET odps.sql.submit.mode=script;
SET odps.sql.bigquery.compatible=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.cartesian=true;
SET odps.sql.groupby.orderby.position.alias=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.fullscan=true;

WITH base_user_org AS ( 
  SELECT
    pid
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS score_date
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS current_jkt_date
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 1, 'mm')                            AS first_window_end
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 2, 'mm')                            AS second_window_end
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 3, 'mm')                            AS third_window_end
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 4, 'mm')                            AS fourth_window_end
    , gpl_user_id
    , ttpl_user_id
    , mgr_user_id
    , hashed_id_number
    , CASE WHEN mature_flag = 1 THEN 'Mature'
      WHEN young_flag = 1 THEN 'Young'
      WHEN ant_flag = 1 THEN 'ANT'
      WHEN current_dpd_flag = 1 THEN 'Current_DPD'
      WHEN dormant_flag = 1 THEN 'Dormant'
      END AS user_segment
    , score
    , avg_proba AS proba
    , lgb_fold_0_proba
    , lgb_fold_1_proba
    , lgb_fold_2_proba
    , lgb_fold_3_proba
    , lgb_fold_4_proba
    , xgb_fold_0_proba
    , xgb_fold_1_proba
    , xgb_fold_2_proba
    , xgb_fold_3_proba
    , xgb_fold_4_proba
    , cgb_fold_0_proba
    , cgb_fold_1_proba
    , cgb_fold_2_proba
    , cgb_fold_3_proba
    , cgb_fold_4_proba
  FROM p_mfc_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.universal_b_score_v1 a
  WHERE _partition_value <= '2026-01-03'
)



, subscores AS ( --
  SELECT pid
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_0_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_0_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_0_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_1_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_1_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_1_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_2_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_2_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_2_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_3_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_3_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_3_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_4_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_4_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_4_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_0_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_0_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_0_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_1_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_1_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_1_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_2_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_2_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_2_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_3_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_3_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_3_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_4_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_4_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_4_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_0_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_0_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_0_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_1_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_1_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_1_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_2_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_2_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_2_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_3_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_3_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_3_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_4_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_4_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_4_subscore
    FROM (
        SELECT pid
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_0_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_0_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_1_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_1_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_2_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_2_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_3_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_3_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_4_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_4_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_0_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_0_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_1_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_1_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_2_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_2_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_3_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_3_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_4_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_4_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_0_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_0_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_1_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_1_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_2_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_2_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_3_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_3_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_4_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_4_proba
        FROM base_user
    )
)

, bill_tracking AS (
    SELECT * EXCEPT (maximum_overdue_days_number)
          , CASE WHEN status_name = 'OVERDUE' THEN
        GREATEST(
            datediff(
                     TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                    TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
              ,'dd')
          , 0
        ) ELSE maximum_overdue_days_number END AS maximum_overdue_days_number
    FROM p_mab_id_mart.risk.detail_gtf_bill_tracking
)

, gpl_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id            AS gpl_user_id
         , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
         , maximum_overdue_days_number  AS over_due_days
         , due_principal_amount AS bill_principal
         , status_name    AS bill_status
    FROM bill_tracking l
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND platform_id IN ('MAB-ID-CICIL', 'ATOME-ID-GOTO')
      AND status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
  )

, ttpl_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id            AS ttpl_user_id
         , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
         , maximum_overdue_days_number  AS over_due_days
         , due_principal_amount AS bill_principal
         , status_name    AS bill_status
    FROM bill_tracking l
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND platform_id IN ('MAB-IDTTBNPL')
      AND status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
  )

  , gpp_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id            AS mgr_user_id
         , CAST(effective_due_timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS effective_due_timestamp
         , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
         , CASE
               WHEN status_name = 'OVERDUE' THEN
                 GREATEST(
                     datediff(
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
                       , 'dd')
                   , 0
                 )
               ELSE maximum_overdue_days_number
             END AS over_due_days
    FROM p_mgr_id_presentation.gopaypinjam.fact_gopaypinjam_bill_snapshot
    WHERE status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
    AND NOT is_deleted_flag

    UNION ALL
    SELECT
    um.migrate_user_id AS mgr_user_id
    , CAST(planned_due_date AS TIMESTAMP) AS effective_due_timestamp
    , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(planned_due_date, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
    , CASE
            WHEN bill_status = 'OVERDUE' THEN
                 GREATEST(
                     datediff(
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(planned_due_date, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
                       , 'dd')
                   , 0
                 )
            ELSE days_past_due
      END AS over_due_days
    FROM p_mgr_id_raw.risk_migration.com_gofin_mgr_data_risk_migration_bill b
      LEFT JOIN p_mgr_id_raw.risk_migration.com_gofin_mgr_data_risk_migration_migrate_user_mapping um
      ON b.user_id = um.user_id
    WHERE bill_status NOT IN ('REBALANCED')
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bill_id ORDER BY b.update_time DESC) = 1
  )

```


```SQL
  , sample_with_bill AS ( --
    SELECT *
    FROM (
      SELECT pid
           , over_due_days
           , due_date
           , CASE
               WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
               WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
               WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
               WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
             END AS performance_win_index
      FROM base_user f
        LEFT JOIN gpl_due_bill g
        ON f.gpl_user_id = g.gpl_user_id
          AND g.due_date >= f.score_date AND g.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')

      UNION ALL
      SELECT pid
           , over_due_days
           , due_date
           , CASE
               WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
               WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
               WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
               WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
             END AS performance_win_index
      FROM base_user f
        LEFT JOIN ttpl_due_bill t
        ON f.ttpl_user_id = t.ttpl_user_id
          AND t.due_date >= f.score_date AND t.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')

      UNION ALL
      SELECT pid
           , over_due_days
           , due_date
           , CASE
               WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
               WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
               WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
               WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
             END AS performance_win_index
      FROM base_user f
        LEFT JOIN gpp_due_bill p
        ON f.mgr_user_id = p.mgr_user_id
          AND p.due_date >= f.score_date AND p.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')
    )
    WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL
  )

, sample_with_gpp_bill AS ( --
    SELECT pid
         , over_due_days
         , CASE
             WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
             WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
             WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
             WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
           END AS performance_win_index
    FROM base_user f
      LEFT JOIN gpp_due_bill p
      ON f.mgr_user_id = p.mgr_user_id
        AND p.due_date >= f.score_date AND p.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')
  )

, dpd AS ( --
    SELECT pid
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m1dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m2dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m3dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m4dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd30
    FROM sample_with_bill
    GROUP BY 1
)

  , gpp_dpd AS ( --
    SELECT pid
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m1dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m1dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m1dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m2dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m2dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m2dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m3dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m3dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m3dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m4dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m4dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m4dpd30
    FROM sample_with_gpp_bill
    GROUP BY 1
  )

, features AS (
SELECT
  pid
  , is_gpl_approved
  , is_ttpl_approved
  , is_gpp_approved
  -- mature model top features
  , utilization_all_product_line_l2eom_avg_amt
  , meta_mpv11_minus_1_pct
  , gpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc_group_user_info_email_domain_normalized
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  , balance_all_product_line_l1eom_avg_amt
  , ttpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
  , utilization_all_product_line_l2eom_avg_amt_group_user_info_education_normalized
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc_group_user_info_job_industry_normalized
  , mgr_historical_utilization_max_l3m
  , gojek_customer_age_months
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l3m_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_os_amt_ratio_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  -- young_model top features
  , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
  , utilization_all_product_line_l1eom_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l3m_div_l24m_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_loan_count_exclude_mab_l12m
--   , meta_mpv11_minus_1_pct
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l9m_loans
  , meta_ttpl_behaviour_encoding_pct
  , is_gpp_approved
  , cbi_report_credit_median_latest_os_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
--   , gojek_customer_age_months
  -- ant_model top features
--   , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l24m_loans
--   , gojek_customer_age_months
--   , meta_mpv11_minus_1_pct
--   , cbi_report_credit_loan_count_exclude_mab_l12m
--   , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  , user_info_education
  , multi_head_v11_id_p2p_360d
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l6m_loans
  , meta_cbi_minus_1_pct
  -- dormant_model top features
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l24m_loans
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l9m_loans
  , gpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_toko_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l12m_loans
  , gpl_historical_delinquent_l6m_max_dpd
  , gpl_historical_delinquent_l3m_max_dpd
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_l6m_collectibility_all_loans
  , is_mgr_approved
--   , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_arr_amt_l9m_loans_excl_cc
  -- dpd_model top features
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l6m_loans
--   , utilization_all_product_line_l1eom_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_median_latest_os_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  , gpl_historical_utilization_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
--   , ttpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
  , gpl_historical_balance_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l3m_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l6m_loans_excl_cc
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l9m_loans_excl_cc
--   , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
FROM p_mfc_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.universal_bscore_v1_features
WHERE _partition_value <= '2026-01-03'
)

, integration AS ( --
select
  a.*
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(first_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m1dpd30 END AS m1dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(second_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m2dpd30 END AS m2dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(third_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m3dpd30 END AS m3dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(fourth_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m4dpd30 END AS m4dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(first_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m1dpd30 END AS gpp_m1dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(second_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m2dpd30 END AS gpp_m2dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(third_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m3dpd30 END AS gpp_m3dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(fourth_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m4dpd30 END AS gpp_m4dpd30
  , s.* EXCEPT(pid)
  , f.* EXCEPT(pid)
  FROM base_user a
  LEFT JOIN dpd ON a.pid = dpd.pid
  LEFT JOIN gpp_dpd ON a.pid = gpp_dpd.pid
  LEFT JOIN subscores s ON a.pid = s.pid
  LEFT JOIN features f ON a.pid = f.pid
)

SELECT
  *
FROM integration;

```

universal 的sql报错

```SQL
-- script-mode
SET odps.sql.submit.mode=script;
SET odps.sql.bigquery.compatible=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.cartesian=true;
SET odps.sql.groupby.orderby.position.alias=true;
SET odps.sql.allow.fullscan=true;

WITH base_user_org AS ( 
  SELECT
    pid
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS score_date
    , TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')) AS current_jkt_date
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 1, 'mm')                            AS first_window_end
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 2, 'mm')                            AS second_window_end
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 3, 'mm')                            AS third_window_end
    , DATEADD(TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(score_timestamp_ts, 'Asia/Jakarta')), 4, 'mm')                            AS fourth_window_end
    , gpl_user_id
    , ttpl_user_id
    , mgr_user_id
    , hashed_id_number
    , CASE WHEN mature_flag = 1 THEN 'Mature'
      WHEN young_flag = 1 THEN 'Young'
      WHEN ant_flag = 1 THEN 'ANT'
      WHEN current_dpd_flag = 1 THEN 'Current_DPD'
      WHEN dormant_flag = 1 THEN 'Dormant'
      END AS user_segment
    , score
    , avg_proba AS proba
    , lgb_fold_0_proba
    , lgb_fold_1_proba
    , lgb_fold_2_proba
    , lgb_fold_3_proba
    , lgb_fold_4_proba
    , xgb_fold_0_proba
    , xgb_fold_1_proba
    , xgb_fold_2_proba
    , xgb_fold_3_proba
    , xgb_fold_4_proba
    , cgb_fold_0_proba
    , cgb_fold_1_proba
    , cgb_fold_2_proba
    , cgb_fold_3_proba
    , cgb_fold_4_proba
  FROM p_mfc_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.universal_b_score_v1 a
  WHERE _partition_value <= '2026-01-03'
)



, subscores AS ( --
  SELECT pid
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_0_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_0_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_0_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_1_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_1_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_1_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_2_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_2_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_2_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_3_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_3_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_3_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_lgb_fold_4_proba)/cap_lgb_fold_4_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS lgb_fold_4_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_0_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_0_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_0_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_1_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_1_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_1_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_2_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_2_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_2_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_3_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_3_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_3_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_xgb_fold_4_proba)/cap_xgb_fold_4_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS xgb_fold_4_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_0_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_0_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_0_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_1_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_1_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_1_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_2_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_2_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_2_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_3_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_3_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_3_subscore
        , CAST(ROUND(LEAST(GREATEST(650 - (50/ln(2))*(ln(exp(3)) - ln((1-cap_cgb_fold_4_proba)/cap_cgb_fold_4_proba)), 400), 1200), 0) as int) AS cgb_fold_4_subscore
    FROM (
        SELECT pid
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_0_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_0_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_1_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_1_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_2_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_2_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_3_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_3_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(lgb_fold_4_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_lgb_fold_4_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_0_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_0_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_1_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_1_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_2_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_2_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_3_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_3_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(xgb_fold_4_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_xgb_fold_4_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_0_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_0_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_1_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_1_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_2_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_2_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_3_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_3_proba
            , LEAST(GREATEST(cgb_fold_4_proba, 0.0004), 0.9622) as cap_cgb_fold_4_proba
        FROM base_user
    )
)

, bill_tracking AS (
    SELECT * EXCEPT (maximum_overdue_days_number)
          , CASE WHEN status_name = 'OVERDUE' THEN
        GREATEST(
            datediff(
                     TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                    TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
              ,'dd')
          , 0
        ) ELSE maximum_overdue_days_number END AS maximum_overdue_days_number
    FROM p_mab_id_mart.risk.detail_gtf_bill_tracking
)

, gpl_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id            AS gpl_user_id
         , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
         , maximum_overdue_days_number  AS over_due_days
         , due_principal_amount AS bill_principal
         , status_name    AS bill_status
    FROM bill_tracking l
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND platform_id IN ('MAB-ID-CICIL', 'ATOME-ID-GOTO')
      AND status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
  )

, ttpl_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id            AS ttpl_user_id
         , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
         , maximum_overdue_days_number  AS over_due_days
         , due_principal_amount AS bill_principal
         , status_name    AS bill_status
    FROM bill_tracking l
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND platform_id IN ('MAB-IDTTBNPL')
      AND status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
  )

  , gpp_due_bill AS (
    SELECT user_id            AS mgr_user_id
         , CAST(effective_due_timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS effective_due_timestamp
         , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
         , CASE
               WHEN status_name = 'OVERDUE' THEN
                 GREATEST(
                     datediff(
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(effective_due_timestamp, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
                       , 'dd')
                   , 0
                 )
               ELSE maximum_overdue_days_number
             END AS over_due_days
    FROM p_mgr_id_presentation.gopaypinjam.fact_gopaypinjam_bill_snapshot
    WHERE status_name NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'REFUND_REBALANCED', 'REBALANCED')
    AND NOT is_deleted_flag

    UNION ALL
    SELECT
    um.migrate_user_id AS mgr_user_id
    , CAST(planned_due_date AS TIMESTAMP) AS effective_due_timestamp
    , CAST(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(planned_due_date, 'Asia/Jakarta') AS DATE)      AS due_date
    , CASE
            WHEN bill_status = 'OVERDUE' THEN
                 GREATEST(
                     datediff(
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'Asia/Jakarta')),
                         TO_DATE(FROM_UTC_TIMESTAMP(planned_due_date, 'Asia/Jakarta'))
                       , 'dd')
                   , 0
                 )
            ELSE days_past_due
      END AS over_due_days
    FROM p_mgr_id_raw.risk_migration.com_gofin_mgr_data_risk_migration_bill b
      LEFT JOIN p_mgr_id_raw.risk_migration.com_gofin_mgr_data_risk_migration_migrate_user_mapping um
      ON b.user_id = um.user_id
    WHERE bill_status NOT IN ('REBALANCED')
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bill_id ORDER BY b.update_time DESC) = 1
  )

```


```SQL
  , sample_with_bill AS ( --
    SELECT *
    FROM (
      SELECT pid
           , over_due_days
           , due_date
           , CASE
               WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
               WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
               WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
               WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
             END AS performance_win_index
      FROM base_user f
        LEFT JOIN gpl_due_bill g
        ON f.gpl_user_id = g.gpl_user_id
          AND g.due_date >= f.score_date AND g.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')

      UNION ALL
      SELECT pid
           , over_due_days
           , due_date
           , CASE
               WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
               WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
               WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
               WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
             END AS performance_win_index
      FROM base_user f
        LEFT JOIN ttpl_due_bill t
        ON f.ttpl_user_id = t.ttpl_user_id
          AND t.due_date >= f.score_date AND t.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')

      UNION ALL
      SELECT pid
           , over_due_days
           , due_date
           , CASE
               WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
               WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
               WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
               WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
             END AS performance_win_index
      FROM base_user f
        LEFT JOIN gpp_due_bill p
        ON f.mgr_user_id = p.mgr_user_id
          AND p.due_date >= f.score_date AND p.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')
    )
    WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL
  )

, sample_with_gpp_bill AS ( --
    SELECT pid
         , over_due_days
         , CASE
             WHEN due_date <= first_window_end  THEN 1
             WHEN due_date <= second_window_end THEN 2
             WHEN due_date <= third_window_end  THEN 3
             WHEN due_date <= fourth_window_end THEN 4
           END AS performance_win_index
    FROM base_user f
      LEFT JOIN gpp_due_bill p
      ON f.mgr_user_id = p.mgr_user_id
        AND p.due_date >= f.score_date AND p.due_date <= DATEADD(f.score_date, 4, 'mm')
  )

, dpd AS ( --
    SELECT pid
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m1dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m1dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m2dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m2dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m3dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m3dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  m4dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) m4dpd30
    FROM sample_with_bill
    GROUP BY 1
)

  , gpp_dpd AS ( --
    SELECT pid
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m1dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m1dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 1, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m1dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m2dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m2dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 2, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m2dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m3dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m3dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 3, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m3dpd30
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 7, NULL) AS BIGINT))  gpp_m4dpd7
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 15, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m4dpd15
         , MAX(CAST(IF(performance_win_index <= 4, over_due_days >= 30, NULL) AS BIGINT)) gpp_m4dpd30
    FROM sample_with_gpp_bill
    GROUP BY 1
  )

, features AS (
SELECT
  pid
  , is_gpl_approved
  , is_ttpl_approved
  , is_gpp_approved
  -- mature model top features
  , utilization_all_product_line_l2eom_avg_amt
  , meta_mpv11_minus_1_pct
  , gpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc_group_user_info_email_domain_normalized
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  , balance_all_product_line_l1eom_avg_amt
  , ttpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
  , utilization_all_product_line_l2eom_avg_amt_group_user_info_education_normalized
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc_group_user_info_job_industry_normalized
  , mgr_historical_utilization_max_l3m
  , gojek_customer_age_months
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l3m_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_os_amt_ratio_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  -- young_model top features
  , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
  , utilization_all_product_line_l1eom_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l3m_div_l24m_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_loan_count_exclude_mab_l12m
--   , meta_mpv11_minus_1_pct
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l9m_loans
  , meta_ttpl_behaviour_encoding_pct
  , is_gpp_approved
  , cbi_report_credit_median_latest_os_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
--   , gojek_customer_age_months
  -- ant_model top features
--   , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l24m_loans
--   , gojek_customer_age_months
--   , meta_mpv11_minus_1_pct
--   , cbi_report_credit_loan_count_exclude_mab_l12m
--   , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  , user_info_education
  , multi_head_v11_id_p2p_360d
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l6m_loans
  , meta_cbi_minus_1_pct
  -- dormant_model top features
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l24m_loans
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l9m_loans
  , gpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_toko_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l12m_loans
  , gpl_historical_delinquent_l6m_max_dpd
  , gpl_historical_delinquent_l3m_max_dpd
  , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_l6m_collectibility_all_loans
  , is_mgr_approved
--   , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_sum_latest_arr_amt_l9m_loans_excl_cc
  -- dpd_model top features
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l6m_loans
--   , utilization_all_product_line_l1eom_avg_amt
  , cbi_report_credit_median_latest_os_amt_l12m_loans_excl_cc
  , gpl_historical_utilization_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
--   , ttpl_historical_utilization_l1eom_all_avg_amt
  , gpl_historical_balance_l1stm_toko_avg_amt
--   , cbi_report_credit_max_hist_dpd_l3m_loans
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l6m_loans_excl_cc
  , cbi_report_credit_avg_latest_arr_amt_l9m_loans_excl_cc
--   , cbi_report_credit_cnt_ever_l3m_dpd_abv_dpd1_ratio_all_loans
FROM p_mfc_id_ds_prd.customer_risk.universal_bscore_v1_features
WHERE _partition_value <= '2026-01-03'
)

, integration AS ( --
select
  a.*
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(first_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m1dpd30 END AS m1dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(second_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m2dpd30 END AS m2dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(third_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m3dpd30 END AS m3dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(fourth_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE dpd.m4dpd30 END AS m4dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(first_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m1dpd30 END AS gpp_m1dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(second_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m2dpd30 END AS gpp_m2dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(third_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m3dpd30 END AS gpp_m3dpd30
  , CASE WHEN current_jkt_date < DATEADD(fourth_window_end, 30, 'dd') THEN NULL ELSE gpp_dpd.gpp_m4dpd30 END AS gpp_m4dpd30
  , s.* EXCEPT(pid)
  , f.* EXCEPT(pid)
  FROM base_user a
  LEFT JOIN dpd ON a.pid = dpd.pid
  LEFT JOIN gpp_dpd ON a.pid = gpp_dpd.pid
  LEFT JOIN subscores s ON a.pid = s.pid
  LEFT JOIN features f ON a.pid = f.pid
)

SELECT
  *
FROM integration;

```
